title: Evaluate Mocking Boundaries
description: Evaluate appropriate mocking boundaries for various testing scenarios. Implement the "Don't Mock What You Don't Own" principle using real dependencies or high-fidelity stubs for third-party APIs.
objectives: Evaluate appropriate mocking boundaries for various testing scenarios.
Implement the "Don't Mock What You Don't Own" principle using real dependencies or high-fidelity stubs for third-party APIs.
